**Pyridine Frontier-Orbital Gap** — DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (PySCF), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: provided as `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz`. SCF converged in 10 cycles.

The HOMO energy is -7.2526 eV, and the LUMO energy is -1.1128 eV.
The HOMO-LUMO gap is 6.1398 eV.

No warnings were reported.
